name: Eternal Rain
overview: When the rain starts to gather and forms into a storm, it becomes the cause of a war of wits, a struggle for power, conflict and “love” amidst “death”. Who will be the only one to win this game?

trailers.title: [ Official Teaser ] ซีรีส์ ฝนล้านฤดู (Eternal Rain) | Mono Original
